## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Swoogo and GrowthX Labs to discuss content performance, SEO strategies, and lead generation efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/8ggZGykxTgwJSgVS1X_6Q6R8FesZXKfT?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance shows strong growth: 300k+ cumulative impressions, 1,500+ visitors in 9 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/8ggZGykxTgwJSgVS1X_6Q6R8FesZXKfT?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)
  - [Blog-driven demo submissions increased in Q3, trending up for Q4](https://fathom.video/share/8ggZGykxTgwJSgVS1X_6Q6R8FesZXKfT?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [Technical SEO improvements suggested: internal linking, sitemap optimization, public knowledge base](https://fathom.video/share/8ggZGykxTgwJSgVS1X_6Q6R8FesZXKfT?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [CRO opportunity identified: implement chat-based lead capture for multi-touch attribution](https://fathom.video/share/8ggZGykxTgwJSgVS1X_6Q6R8FesZXKfT?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Metrics

  - [New articles: 112 total, driving 80k+ net new impressions](https://fathom.video/share/8ggZGykxTgwJSgVS1X_6Q6R8FesZXKfT?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)
  - [Clicks: 1,500+ total visitors, \~350 net new clicks in the last week](https://fathom.video/share/8ggZGykxTgwJSgVS1X_6Q6R8FesZXKfT?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [Impressions trending up, slight decline in clicks for older content (to be investigated)](https://fathom.video/share/8ggZGykxTgwJSgVS1X_6Q6R8FesZXKfT?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [Highest performing pages identified (some B2C-oriented)](https://fathom.video/share/8ggZGykxTgwJSgVS1X_6Q6R8FesZXKfT?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)

### SEO Strategy and Improvements

  - [Internal linking crucial: Core product pages should be 1-2 clicks from homepage](https://fathom.video/share/8ggZGykxTgwJSgVS1X_6Q6R8FesZXKfT?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [Sitemap optimization: Build HTML sitemap into homepage for better crawlability](https://fathom.video/share/8ggZGykxTgwJSgVS1X_6Q6R8FesZXKfT?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)
  - [Knowledge base: Push to make it public for SEO benefits](https://fathom.video/share/8ggZGykxTgwJSgVS1X_6Q6R8FesZXKfT?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Landing pages: 6 keyword-optimized LPs on main domain (e.g., swoogo.com/lp/...)](https://fathom.video/share/8ggZGykxTgwJSgVS1X_6Q6R8FesZXKfT?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)

### Lead Generation and CRO

  - [Blog-driven demo submissions increased in Q3, positive trend for Q4](https://fathom.video/share/8ggZGykxTgwJSgVS1X_6Q6R8FesZXKfT?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [Opportunity: Implement chat-based lead capture (e.g., Drift) for:](https://fathom.video/share/8ggZGykxTgwJSgVS1X_6Q6R8FesZXKfT?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
      - [Multi-touch attribution](https://fathom.video/share/8ggZGykxTgwJSgVS1X_6Q6R8FesZXKfT?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
      - [Vertical-specific nudges](https://fathom.video/share/8ggZGykxTgwJSgVS1X_6Q6R8FesZXKfT?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
      - [Email capture forms triggered by page/vertical](https://fathom.video/share/8ggZGykxTgwJSgVS1X_6Q6R8FesZXKfT?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)

### Upcoming Events and Priorities

  - [Swoogo user conference next week in Austin](https://fathom.video/share/8ggZGykxTgwJSgVS1X_6Q6R8FesZXKfT?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
  - [Marketing team focused on event planning post-board meeting](https://fathom.video/share/8ggZGykxTgwJSgVS1X_6Q6R8FesZXKfT?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mitchell to send meeting notes to Stacey and Will](https://fathom.video/share/8ggZGykxTgwJSgVS1X_6Q6R8FesZXKfT?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)

  - [Investigate slight decline in clicks for older content pieces](https://fathom.video/share/8ggZGykxTgwJSgVS1X_6Q6R8FesZXKfT?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [Consider implementing suggested SEO improvements (internal linking, sitemap)](https://fathom.video/share/8ggZGykxTgwJSgVS1X_6Q6R8FesZXKfT?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [Explore chat-based lead capture implementation for improved CRO](https://fathom.video/share/8ggZGykxTgwJSgVS1X_6Q6R8FesZXKfT?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
